title: v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery
description:
23 May 2026 merge wave: eight subplanner tracks integrated on main (compiler-mod-execution, native-di-codegen, export-ffi-link-time, foreign-lib-import-cli, runtime-phase-b-gc, corelib-tiering, tooling-packageKind). Anchors mod host, export FFI, import lib, phase B GC, and tier-tagged corelib landings before post-merge CI.

- **Subject:** merge(v0.3): tooling-package-kind-tool-and-formatter-spec into main
- **Closed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Cutoff:** `f57377a`→`aaddd32` on superrepo `beskid`
- **Workstreams:** `compiler-mods`, `stabilization`, `superrepo-orchestration`, `ffi-export`, `concurrency-runtime`, `pckg-registry`

## Relation
Delivery anchor for **24** catalog task(s) in the v0.3 window; see linked workstreams and tasks with `milestoneId` / `deliverableId` `v03-merge-wave`.
